expected_decision_range: Build only after binding operating rules and joint monitoring
suspicious_decisions: Build based only on upstream domestic permit authority
Do not build outright without acknowledging upstream water-security need

final_recommendation.multi_agent: Defer pending binding basin agreement, joint monitoring, and drought-contingent operating rules
final_recommendation.single_agent: Defer until downstream agreement and monitoring

key_deliberative_contributions: Drought-contingent vs. average-flow operating rule distinction — produced via Hydrologist + Downstream Farmers exchange
Monitoring enforceability as governance linchpin — produced via Legal + Moderator joint analysis
Both competing legal interpretations preserved as contested — produced via audit corrections A1 and A2
Basin-wide BCR 1.05 vs. upstream-only 1.36 — produced via Economist required challenge
Ramsar wetland seasonal flood pulse gap — produced via Ecologist and Wetland NGO exchange
